channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iran's Supreme Leader: Revenge 'Will Most Certainly Be Carried Out'
item.description: Iranian Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei announced on Saturday that revenge for his father's assassination 'will most certainly be carried out.' Why it...

item.title: U.S. gives Iran Saturday deadline to publicly renounce Hormuz attacks
item.description: The Trump administration is demanding that Iran issue a public statement acknowledging the Strait of Hormuz is open and committing to stop firing on c...

item.title: Inside Mike Johnson's dÃ©jÃ vu cycle of failed rule votes
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson will face the same problem next week that he faced last week: a bloc of Republicans willing to shut down the House floor over the...

item.title: Apple sues OpenAI for trade secret theft
item.description: Apple is suing OpenAI for trade secret theft, alleging the AI giant deliberately and systematically solicited and stole confidential information from ...
